retroglyph ← Back

Interactive Demos

Every demo runs entirely in the browser via WebAssembly — no server, no install.

__ROWS__
Example Headless Terminal Software

Headless renders as plain text (a fixed-size character grid, no canvas) — the same Headless backend used in tests, driven here by a browser requestAnimationFrame loop and an on-screen button toolbar. Terminal (via xterm.js) is planned but not wired up yet — greyed out until a future pass adds it. Software is the CPU-rasterized pixel backend, rendered to a <canvas>. Greyed-out cells mean that backend isn't available for that example, not that it failed to build.

github.com/crates-lurey-io/retroglyph
